title: Whatfix Content
description: Schema representing a Whatfix content item such as a flow, tooltip, task list, smart tip, beacon, popup, survey, article, or video.

contentId.description: Unique identifier for the content item.

name.description: Display name of the content item.

targetUrl.description: URL pattern where this content is displayed (supports wildcards).

createdAt.description: When this content item was created.

modifiedAt.description: When this content item was last modified.

viewCount.description: Total number of times this content has been viewed.
